hypothesis: An ML formation-energy predictor trained on a dataset augmented with DFT-relaxed perturbed structures (including medium and large perturbations) will predict formation energies of generative-model outputs with mean absolute error ≤ 0.08 eV/atom, such that an energy-based Earth Mover’s Distance computed from these surrogate predictions correlates with DFT-based SUN scores at Pearson r ≥ 0.8 across both MP- and OQMD-like chemical domains.
